data.name: AV Sex Manager
data.detailed_description:
Run a sizzling cam studio filled with beautiful models for every taste. In AV Sex Manager, you choose the perfect lineup based on daily audience cravings, use hands-on tools to verify hidden traits, and unlock rewards through strong performance. Learn the roster, read the demand, and send them live.

You’re hired to run a sizzling cam studio with beautiful models for every taste all different, all tempting, each with her own bio, temperament, and hobbies.

Every day the audience craves something specific: brunette or blonde, tattoos or clean skin, dressed to tease or gloriously undressed. Your job is simple and delicious: pick the perfect lineup and send them live.

This is a hands-on casting loop with playful inspection tools to verify hidden traits and rotating daily criteria that keep demand fresh without confusion. Choose well and the tips pour in; slip up and you’ll feel it.

What Players Get

  • A Fixed, Learnable Roster Recognize favorites and savor their unique write-ups. Master a cast you can actually learn.

  • Endless Replayability Daily criteria change what the chat wants, so sessions feel fresh without changing who the girls are.

  • Casting That Teases Back Quick reads, decisive choices, and tools that let you peek past outfits when the rules demand it.

  • Rewards That Matter A sprawling gallery of character-tied statics and scenes

data.short_description: Run a seductive cam studio with distinct models. Each day, rotating selection criteria—body, hair/eyes, dress or undress, tattoos, hobbies, personality and more - shift what the chat craves. Spot the right matches, go live, earn tips, and unlock explicit, character-tied scenes.
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
